g.title: 矩形.16
g.desc: NP sends sleep PG request to SYSON PMC
g.text: NP sends sleep PG request to SYSON PMC

g.title: 矩形.32
g.desc: NP enables AP clock, and sends SEV
g.text: NP enables AP clock,and sends SEV

g.title: 矩形.53
g.desc: AP executes from where it sleeps
g.text: AP executes from where it sleeps

g.title: 矩形.80
g.desc: NP executes from where it sleeps
g.text: NP executes from where it sleeps

g.title: 矩形.82
g.desc: PMC turns on SOC domain clock
g.text: PMC turns on SOC domain clock
